projects.title: Equation Solver Chat Bot
projects.description: Built a chat bot using Python and Docker...
features: Integration with Docker for easy deployment

projects.title: Virus Propagation Simulation Covid-19
projects.description: Developed a simulation using Python, Graph Theory, and Probability to optimize Virus Propagation control strategies.
projects.technicalDetails: Implemented algorithms based on graph theory and probability to simulate Virus behavior in various scenarios.

projects.title: Management Software for Law Firm
projects.description: Developed a management system that cut legal file processing time by 40% using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
projects.technicalDetails: Built using a MERN stack, with Express for the backend API and React for the frontend interface.

projects.title: Messenger-Live Messaging Application
projects.description: Developed a real-time messaging application similar to Slack using Node.js, React, and WebSocket.
projects.technicalDetails: Leveraged WebSocket for real-time communication and MongoDB for data storage.

projects.title: Tutoring Applications
projects.description: Developed a cross-platform tutoring app that connects students and tutors with live chat, scheduling tools, and resource access.
features: Live chat functionality between students and tutors
Scheduling tools for easy appointment management
Admin dashboard for data tracking and user management
projects.technicalDetails: Developed a cross-platform application using React Native for mobile and Node.js/Express for the backend.
